value_signal: The public Devpost listing shows INR 99,999 in prizes and frames the event around building profitable SaaS platforms that real users will pay for.
eligibility_or_region_notes: The public rules say builders may compete solo or in teams and that participation is fully online; any further sponsor-specific constraints should be verified directly before submission.
deadline_or_currentness: Current public page shows Jul 1 - Aug 1, 2026 and the hackathon is live now.
evidence_gate: Devpost submission receipt plus later judging, verification, and prize delivery proof.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a no-spend profitable SaaS concept that reuses the public lead network and looks like something real users could pay for.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must confirm fit, register on Devpost if eligible, and submit the project.
automation_boundary: No login, Devpost submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, wallet, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The prize pool is real, but no submission, ranking, verification, or payout has been confirmed.
suggested_next_check: If truthfully eligible, map the AI Monkey public lead network into the smallest possible profitable SaaS demo and submission checklist.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after verified submission, prize delivery, or usable value delivery.
